mapper.sql: pm.medical_type, pm.dept_name, pm.office_name, pm.dept_id, pm.request_date, pm.approval_by, pm.approval_result, pm.oa_order, pm.approval_date, pm.enabled_flag, pm.approval_node, pm.approval_employee, pm.id, pm.create_time, pm.create_by, pm.update_time, pm.update_by, pm.submit_flag

${tAlias}.medical_type as ${tAlias}_medical_type, ${tAlias}.dept_name as ${tAlias}_dept_name, ${tAlias}.office_name as ${tAlias}_office_name, ${tAlias}.dept_id as ${tAlias}_dept_id, ${tAlias}.request_date as ${tAlias}_request_date, ${tAlias}.approval_by as ${tAlias}_approval_by, ${tAlias}.approval_result as ${tAlias}_approval_result, ${tAlias}.oa_order as ${tAlias}_oa_order, ${tAlias}.approval_date as ${tAlias}_approval_date, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.approval_node as ${tAlias}_approval_node, ${tAlias}.approval_employee as ${tAlias}_approval_employee, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.submit_flag as ${tAlias}_submit_flag

select
,
from pm_medical pm join pm_employee pe on pm.approval_by = pe.id
mapper.insert: insert into pm_medical (medical_type, dept_name, office_name, dept_id, request_date, approval_by, approval_result, oa_order, approval_date, enabled_flag, approval_node, approval_employee,submit_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{medicalType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{officeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{approvalBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{approvalResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oaOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{approvalNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalEmployee,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{submitFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update pm_medical set medical_type = #{medicalType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_name = #{deptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, office_name = #{officeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dept_id = #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, request_date = #{requestDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, approval_by = #{approvalBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, approval_result = #{approvalResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, oa_order = #{oaOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approval_date = #{approvalDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, submit_flag = #{submitFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, approval_node = #{approvalNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, approval_employee = #{approvalEmployee,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select case when exists ( select 1 from pm_medical where medical_type='干部层年度体检' and (approval_result='pass' or approval_result='通过') and (datepart(yy,approval_date) =YEAR(GETDATE())) ) and exists ( select 1 from pm_medical where medical_type='特殊工种年度体检' and (approval_result='pass' or approval_result='通过') and (datepart(yy,approval_date) =YEAR(GETDATE())) ) then 1 else 0 end

select count(*) from pm_medical pm JOIN pm_employee pe ON pm.approval_by = pe.id
and pm.submit_flag=0 and pm.enabled_flag=1
